name: Canon
description: Canon is a global leader in imaging technology, offering a comprehensive range of printers, copiers, and multifunction devices for home and office use. As an authorized Canon dealer, Viabtech provides genuine Canon products with full warranty and after-sales support across Tanzania.

name: Epson
description: Epson leads the way in inkjet technology with its revolutionary EcoTank and WorkForce series. Viabtech is an authorized Epson dealer providing sales, support, and service for the full range of Epson printing solutions in Tanzania.

name: Lenovo
description: Lenovo offers a robust lineup of enterprise-grade laser printers and multifunction devices built for modern workplaces. Viabtech stocks the full range of Lenovo printing products with competitive pricing and technical support.

name: Dell
description: Dell printers deliver reliable performance and low total cost of ownership for businesses of all sizes. Viabtech provides Dell printing solutions with expert setup, configuration, and ongoing support.
